title: Add Bead Priority Field And Serialization
description: Extend the Bead model with an optional priority field, normalize allowed values so normal maps to None, and preserve backward-compatible deserialization for existing bead JSON that omits the field.
acceptance_criteria: Bead supports `priority: str | None = None` with `high` as the persisted non-default value and normal treated as `None`.
Existing bead JSON missing `priority` deserializes without error and behaves as normal priority.
Invalid priority values are rejected at the model/parsing boundary used by CLI and storage flows.
JSON serialization emits a nullable `priority` field compatible with existing storage behavior.
